primitives.title: Runtime Spine
primitives.summary: Flat dependency record for routes, timers, stores, workspace, sessions, observability, and source polling.

primitives.title: Workspace Control
primitives.summary: Capture macOS/AeroSpace window state, plan bounded restores, execute safe workspace/window/frame moves.

primitives.title: Task Workspace Memory
primitives.summary: Persist task-specific workspace snapshots so later papers inherit task desk state.

primitives.title: Ambient Autosave
primitives.summary: Debounced current-task workspace capture with manual-mode skip, follows windows, blocklists, task-window claim filtering, tagged-window inference, process-tree claim inference, process-root claim expansion, and foreign claimed-window cleanup.
gaps: Task-session controllers should expose stable root pids by default; unwrapped LaunchServices-detached apps still need tags, process ancestry, or routed resources.

primitives.title: Task Window Claims
primitives.summary: Declare or infer that windows belong to tasks by window identity or process root so foreign windows do not pollute active paper snapshots and can be redirected home.

primitives.title: Follows Windows
primitives.summary: Detect windows seen across several workspaces and move them with focused task workspace unless excluded; redirect claimed foreign-task windows back home.

primitives.title: Queue And Paper Routing
primitives.summary: Route external events into prioritized human-review papers with actions, leases, lineage, and idempotency.

primitives.title: Task Intake Onboarding
primitives.summary: Scan existing browser/window context into proposed tasks, then approve or reject onboarding workbenches.

primitives.title: Reading Queue
primitives.summary: Promote idle unbound browser contexts into task_reading_queue papers manually or by age threshold.

primitives.title: Master Command Router
primitives.summary: Route one universal command to tasks, idle sessions, fan-out targets, or queue prioritization.

primitives.title: Task Session Control
primitives.summary: Provider-neutral task session list/start/bind/followup/replace for Codex, Claude, fake, and terminal sessions.

primitives.title: Context Capture And Restore
primitives.summary: Store context resources and manage local restore requests for browser tabs, files, and deeplinks.

primitives.title: Manual Mode
primitives.summary: Pause automation, save manual desktop, block queue lease-next, and restore or preserve manual desk.

primitives.title: Agent And Source Hooks
primitives.summary: Poll Slack/GitHub/local/MCP/voice/agent-run sources into event routing and task sessions.

primitives.title: Agent Focus Binding
primitives.summary: Resolve foreground Codex windows, inspect Codex/Claude session logs, and auto-bind task sessions from visible agent windows.

primitives.title: Paper Triggers
primitives.summary: Let tasks declare event-matching rules that can create routed papers from future agent/source events.

primitives.title: Mac App And Hotkey Surface
primitives.summary: Swift macOS queue UI, hotkeys, manual mode, restore, voice capture, and master command shell.

primitives.title: Observability And Proof Harnesses
primitives.summary: Health, metrics, activity, proof runners, latency checks, and machine-readable manifests.
